name: Underlined Messages
description: Underlined messages are migrated as normal text. The Microsoft Teams API does not include underline formatting information.

name: Quoted Messages
description: Quoted message formatting is migrated only as plain text and does not retain its quoted or referenced format in Google Chat.

name: GIFs as Links
description: GIF content is migrated only as a URL link rather than as an embedded or playable GIF in Google Chat.

name: Font Colour and Text Highlight
description: Font colour and text highlight styling are not preserved; content appears as plain text in Google Chat.

name: Font Size
description: Font size styling is not preserved; all text appears in default font size in Google Chat.

name: Combined Bold and Italic
description: Combined formatting may migrate with unwanted spacing or broken structure due to API returning raw formatted text.

name: Only One Sticker Preserved
description: When multiple stickers are in one message, only one appears as sticker; remaining are shown as links. Google Chat does not allow multiple stickers in one message.

name: Only One File as Attachment
description: When multiple files are in one message, only one is migrated as file; remaining are migrated as links. Google Chat does not support multiple files in a single message.

name: Important Messages
description: Important message styling from Teams is not preserved; messages appear as normal text in Google Chat.

name: Forwarded Messages
description: Forwarded messages do not appear in the destination Google Chat. API does not provide a flag to detect forwarded messages; Google Chat does not support posting as forwarded content.

name: Channel Message from Thread
description: When a message is posted in both thread and main channel, the parent message in the main channel is not migrated; only thread-level conversation is visible in destination.

name: Translated Messages
description: Only the original message content is migrated; translated versions are not migrated. API does not provide translated content.

name: Unmapped User Mentions
description: If a mentioned user is not mapped, the mention is migrated as plain text showing the original source username.

name: Loop Components
description: Loop components (live tables, task lists, collaborative blocks) are not migrated. Google Chat does not support Microsoft Loop components.

name: Messages Posted to Multiple Channels
description: Label information for messages posted to multiple channels is not preserved; message is migrated as normal text without multi-channel indication.

name: Channel Mentions with Spaces or Special Characters
description: Channel mentions with spaces or special characters in the name are not preserved properly and appear as plain text due to Microsoft Graph API limitation.

name: Announcement Messages
description: Announcement or banner-style messages do not appear as announcements in Google Chat; only basic text or file attachments may be migrated.

name: Angle Brackets in Messages
description: Text enclosed in angle brackets (e.g. <test>) may be interpreted as HTML in Google Chat and hidden or altered.

name: Message Reactions
description: Message reactions from Teams do not appear in Google Chat. Only the original message content is migrated.

name: Archived Channels
description: Channels that were archived in Teams are migrated as regular active channels in the destination Chat. Archived status is not clearly returned by the source API.

name: Some Emojis Not Migrated Correctly
description: Certain Teams custom emojis (e.g. High Five) may appear as different Unicode emojis (e.g. Raised Hands) in Google Chat.

name: Polls in DMs
description: Polls in Direct Messages are migrated as normal text only; interactive poll components are not preserved.

name: Public Teams Channels as Private
description: Public channel conversations from Teams are migrated into Google Chat as private chat spaces; public visibility is not preserved.
